# Volux - AI-Readable Site Information
# Canonical location: https://volux.devlifeeasy.com/llms.txt

> Volux is a premium browser extension for per-tab volume control on Chrome and Firefox.

## Quick Summary

Volux lets you control audio volume for individual browser tabs and websites. Per-domain volume control with instant mute and persistent settings.

## Links

- Website: https://volux.devlifeeasy.com/
- Chrome Extension: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/volux/
- Firefox Add-on: https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/volux-volume-controller/
- GitHub: https://github.com/vannk84/volux
- Privacy Policy: https://volux.devlifeeasy.com/privacy.html

## Features

- Per-domain volume control
- Smart tab grouping by site
- One-click mute
- Persistent settings
- Live audio detection
- Lightweight, no background processes

## Pricing

- Free: Basic features
- Pro ($2): Unlimited domains, auto-detect, scan tabs, lifetime access

## Contact

- Support: support@devlifeeasy.com
- Issues: https://github.com/vannk84/volux/issues
